description_short: India's 1st and only mattress with Patented SmartCell™ Memory Foam. It adapts to your body, provides targeted support, and helps you sleep up to 6°C cooler.

construction_layers.name: HyperXD™ Foam
construction_layers.notes: Adaptive foam that cradles without sinking.

construction_layers.name: Patented SmartCell™ Memory Foam
construction_layers.notes: Patented micro-cell design for precise pressure relief and improved airflow.

construction_layers.name: GOLS Certified Natural Latex
construction_layers.notes: Provides responsive bounce, natural breathability, and antimicrobial protection.

construction_layers.name: HR Base Foam
construction_layers.notes: High resilience foundation for long-term durability.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Vacuum clean cover, spot clean only

proprietary_tech.name: SmartCell™ Technology
proprietary_tech.description: Patented technology for airflow and pressure relief.

proprietary_tech.name: HyperXD™ Foam
proprietary_tech.description: Adaptive foam that cradles without sinking.

faq_specs.question: What is the firmness or feel of the Founder's Mattress? How thick is it?
faq_specs.answer: The Founder's Mattress is 9 inches thick and offers a balanced, medium feel.

faq_specs.question: What materials are used in the Founder's mattress?
faq_specs.answer: The Founder's mattress is a combination of GOLS-certified natural latex, HyperXD™ foam, and SmartCell™ memory foam.

faq_specs.question: Will this mattress stay cool in hot weather?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, the mattress uses CoolTec™ cooling fabric and integrated SmartCell™ airflow channels to keep you cool.

faq_specs.question: What makes the Founder's Mattress different from other luxury mattresses in India?
faq_specs.answer: The Founder's Mattress offers a four-layer hybrid design engineered specifically for Indian sleepers.

notes_observed: Total height per FAQ = 9 inches (~228mm) confirms layers sum. Only Single price extracted — Double/Queen/King MRP/SP not visible without variant selection. Weight_kg not on page.
